name: X-Golf Colorado Springs
address: 1808 Spring Water Pt, Colorado Springs, CO 80908
about: X-Golf Colorado Springs is a golf simulation venue that offers a technologically advanced indoor golfing experience. The venue provides multiple bays with high-quality simulators for golfers to practice and play on virtual courses. Pricing and specific amenities details are not readily available from the provided website content. The facility appears designed for golfers seeking a convenient and climate-controlled environment to enjoy the sport year-round.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulation technology for realistic play
Convenient indoor environment for year-round access
Variety of virtual courses to choose from
Suitable for both practice and social events

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own golf clubs for the best experience, though rental clubs may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: While outside food and drinks may be restricted, the venue offers a full bar and food service for all guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, playing 18 holes takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue welcomes families and is suitable for children, though specific kid-friendly amenities are not detailed.
